---
title: "CheckSomeFunctions"
author: "Rolf"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Some function checks

```{r}

## Beschreibung
packageDescription("pcurveMix")$Description


##  Fitting
set.seed(1)

# p-values simulieren
pvals <- random(
  n     = 1500,
  mu    = 2,
  sigma = 1,
  pi    = 0.5,
  alpha = 0.05,
  tails = 2
)

# fitten
fit <- fit_p_curve(p=pvals)

# Ergebnis ansehen
fit



## pdf plot
p_grid <- seq(0.001, 1, length.out = 500)

dens1 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 0.0, pi = 0.6, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)
dens2 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 0.5, pi = 0.6, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)
dens3 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 1.0, pi = 0.6, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)

plot(
  p_grid, dens1, type = "l", lwd = 2,
  xlab = "p-value",
  ylab = "Density",
   ylim = c(0,30),
  main = "Effect of sigma on the p-curve PDF"
)

lines(p_grid, dens2, lwd = 2, lty = 2)
lines(p_grid, dens3, lwd = 2, lty = 3)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = c("sigma = 0", "sigma = 0.5", "sigma = 1"),
  lwd = 2,
  lty = c(1, 2, 3)
)




p_grid <- seq(0.001, 1, length.out = 500)

dens1 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 0.5, pi = 0.2, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)
dens2 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 0.5, pi = 0.6, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)
dens3 <- pdf(p_grid, mu = 2, sigma = 0.5, pi = 1.0, alpha = 0.05, tails = 2)

plot(
  p_grid, dens1, type = "l", lwd = 2,
  xlab = "p-value",
  ylab = "Density",
  ylim = c(0,30),
  main = "Effect of pi on the p-curve PDF"
)

lines(p_grid, dens2, lwd = 2, lty = 2)
lines(p_grid, dens3, lwd = 2, lty = 3)

legend(
  "topright",
  legend = c("pi = 0.2", "pi = 0.6", "pi = 1.0"),
  lwd = 2,
  lty = c(1, 2, 3)
)

```
